raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint arises from Complaint # XXXX filed XX/XX/year>. American Express limited response was that they were attempting to resolve the dispute. CFPB closed the complaint. No substantive issues have been addressed. 

Amex gave me until XX/XX/XXXX to submit additional documentation where I requested the refund from the merchant ( see attached ) On XX/XX/XXXX at XXXXXXXX XXXX, I submitted such documentation ( see attached. ) On XX/XX/XXXX at XXXXXXXX XXXX ( or 25 minutes after my submission ) Amex denied my dispute using the exact same boilerplate language it used to deny the claim on XX/XX/XXXX providing none other but the initial response from the merchant from XXXXXXXX XXXX ( see attached correspondences from American Express using the same language. ) Simply put, Amex is not even considering my evidence. They asked for proof of communication that I requested the refund, and clear convincing evidence was submitted. Why would they request such proof to simply deny the claim almost IMMEDIATELY using the EXACT SAME LANGUAGE? 

I have submitted substantial evidence on the complaint # XXXX. 

First, I request that complaint # XXXX is addressed substantively ; Second, I request that Amex review my evidence in accordance to consumer protection laws ; Third, I request that the charge be reversed and be refunded in it's entirety ; and Fourth, an investigation is opened regarding American Express XXXX preference on merchants to have them continue accepting their cards and lack of review of evidence submitted by users.
